history.title: Larry the Cable Guy on 'Cars 2' backlash
history.description: By any criteria, Cars 2 was a fabulously successful sequel, but that didn’t stop nitpickers from downgrading the Pixar film for its decision to build a spy thriller around Mater, the dimwitted tow-truck voiced by comedian Larry the Cable Guy (née Daniel Whitney). Lightning Mc Queen’s loyal sidekick’
